prompt: Tech-requirements.md exists with reviewed_at: null. Let's start drafting ADRs.

assertions.text: refuses to draft any ADR in this turn
explicitly cites reviewed_at being null (or unsatisfied) as the reason for refusing
tells the user how to unblock: set reviewed_at to today's ISO date
does NOT write any ADR file under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/
reads the existing tech-requirements.md to verify the gate state (rather than just trusting the prompt)
